relationship-counseling.name: Dr. Emily Carter
relationship-counseling.bio: Specialized in helping couples improve communication and resolve conflicts. Expert in relationship dynamics and emotional intelligence.

relationship-counseling.name: Dr. Alex Morgan
relationship-counseling.bio: Certified relationship expert with extensive experience in helping individuals and couples build meaningful connections.

relationship-counseling.name: Dr. Sarah Williams
relationship-counseling.bio: Expert in conflict resolution and helping couples navigate difficult conversations with empathy and understanding.

breakup-recovery.name: John Smith
breakup-recovery.bio: Dedicated to helping individuals heal from heartbreak and rediscover their strength. Specialized in emotional recovery and self-discovery.

breakup-recovery.name: Dr. Lisa Anderson
breakup-recovery.bio: Expert in guiding individuals through the healing process after breakups, focusing on personal growth and moving forward.

breakup-recovery.name: Dr. Michael Chen
breakup-recovery.bio: Specialized in helping people navigate the emotional challenges of breakups and build resilience for future relationships.

marriage-guidance.name: Dr. Robert Taylor
marriage-guidance.bio: Expert in helping married couples rekindle passion, improve intimacy, and build lasting partnerships through evidence-based techniques.

marriage-guidance.name: Dr. Jennifer Martinez
marriage-guidance.bio: Dedicated to helping couples reconnect, rebuild trust, and create a stronger foundation for their marriage.

marriage-guidance.name: Dr. David Kim
marriage-guidance.bio: Specialized in marriage counseling with a focus on communication, conflict resolution, and long-term relationship planning.

pre-marital-coaching.name: Dr. Amanda Foster
pre-marital-coaching.bio: Expert in preparing couples for marriage through comprehensive coaching on expectations, finances, and family dynamics.

pre-marital-coaching.name: Dr. James Wilson
pre-marital-coaching.bio: Dedicated to helping engaged couples build a strong foundation for their future together through structured pre-marital coaching.

pre-marital-coaching.name: Dr. Maria Rodriguez
pre-marital-coaching.bio: Specialized in pre-marital coaching with expertise in helping couples set realistic expectations and plan for a successful marriage.
